body:
## Summary

Implements limit/offset pagination on `GET /items` per issue #1.

- Default page size of **20**, configurable via the `limit` query param (allowed range 1-100).
- `offset` query param to skip items (default 0).
- Response is now an envelope: `{ items, total, limit, offset }`.
- Out-of-range `limit` values return a `422`.

## Docs

`limit`/`offset` documented in the README with a params table and an example response envelope.

## Tests

Added pagination tests (default page size, custom limit/offset, offset past end, validation bounds). All passing via `pytest`.

Closes #1

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Add pagination to the items list endpoint (closes #1)
